svg.text: SDD-Upgrade Kiến trúc tổng quan (Governed Multi-Agent Harness for Claude Code)
Repository: tranhieutt/software_development_department · Bản chất: Hệ điều hành quy trình kỹ thuật phần mềm cho AI agent

g.text: Slash Commands & Workflow Gates — người dùng kích hoạt quy trình
Lifecycle 6 giai đoạn · DEFINE → PLAN → SPEC → BUILD → VERIFY → SHIP (Steel Discipline gates)
Bộ máy 28 agent · Vertical delegation · Conflict → cto / technical-director · Cross-domain → producer
frontend-developer · backend-developer · fullstack-developer · mobile-developer · ai-programmer · network-programmer · tools-programmer · ui-programmer · data-engineer · analytics-engineer
ux-researcher · tech-writer · prototyper · performance-analyst · devops-engineer · security-engineer · accessibility-specialist · community-manager · ui-spec-designer · diagnostics
5-Tier Memory Architecture · 3-Question Relevance Gate · Max 3 Tier-2 files / session
Governance & Source-of-Truth · ADR-004 UFSM · ADR-006 Shared State · ADR-007 Dual Lanes
Session Lifecycle Hooks · Bash Guard · Validation · Telemetry · Memory persistence
